topic: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view.

parsed_generation.script:
Scene 1 — Opening (0-2s): Street-level side view of a yellow NYC taxi at curb; low camera angle; neon billboards rise behind the vehicle.
Scene 2 — Through the glow (2-5s): Tracking shot from behind the taxi; headlights slice through neon; camera stays low and centered as the taxi rolls through Times Square, street-level.
Scene 3 — Pass and settle (5-8s): Taxi passes under a marquee and continues; camera pulls back to reveal the illuminated street; On-screen text: 'Times Square in motion'
parsed_generation.narration: A single yellow taxi carves through the neon heartbeat of Times Square. The street-level, low-angle framing makes the city feel expansive around a single vehicle. Muted city sounds are implied by the rhythm of the visuals.

feedback: The output stays true to the topic with a clear taxi-focused, street-level Times Square sequence, and the narration adds mood. To align with the concise, action-first reference style, tighten phrasing and keep the focus strictly on the taxi and its movement with explicit camera actions per shot. Reduce metaphor and ensure each scene remains a single subject while providing precise transitions and cues for on-screen text.
strengths: Clear hero subject (yellow taxi) and street-level framing.
fixes: Adopt terse, action-first wording; specify concrete camera moves for each shot (e.g., 'low-angle curbside', 'tracking behind taxi').
Increase environmental specificity (pedestrians at mid-distance, reflections on storefronts) without adding extra subjects.
